Bash(aws dynamodb scan \\
  --table-name DarlingsRealConv-Users \\
  --filter-expression "department = :e OR #loc = :e OR jobTitle = :e OR attribute_not_exists\(department\) OR attribute_not_exists\(#loc\) OR attribute_not_exists\(jobTitle\)" \\
  --expression-attribute-names '{"#loc": "location"}' \\
  --expression-attribute-values '{":e": {"S": ""}}' \\
  --projection-expression "userId" \\
  --region us-east-1 \\
  --query "Items[].userId.S" \\
  --output text | tr '\\t' '\\n' | while read id; do
    aws dynamodb delete-item \\
      --table-name DarlingsRealConv-Users \\
      --key "{\\"userId\\": {\\"S\\": \\"$id\\"}}" \\
      --region us-east-1
  done
echo "Done — deleted 142 incomplete accounts")
